title: ANIMA combined calibration: w_lr=0.0003 + gamma=3.0 yields +0.1256

content.purpose: Establish calibrated ANIMA baseline combining w_lr interior optimum (0.0003) with gamma boundary-optimal (3.0). Final Stage 2 reactive test confirms vacuous verdict.

results.reactive_failure_mechanism: At typical err~0.35, w_lr_eff = 0.001/(1+2*0.35) = 0.00059 — 2× above the optimum of 0.0003. The reactive rule cannot reach the optimum because mean_abs_err never exceeds ~0.35 in this system. Structural floor prevents convergence to optimal w_lr.

interpretation.stage2_final: 6th reactive config tested (base=0.001, scale=2.0), chosen to give w_lr_eff in range [0.0003, 0.001]. Still fails because typical error keeps w_lr_eff ≈ 0.0006, 2× above optimum. Confirms per-step error cannot guide w_lr to sequence-level optimum.
interpretation.gamma_calibration: gamma=3.0 at w_lr=0.0003 yields +0.1256 — effects compound. Prior gamma sweep (entry 059) was at w_lr=0.01; combined calibration is multiplicative not additive.
interpretation.new_canonical: w_lr=0.0003, gamma=3.0. alive_gap=+0.1256. All other params unchanged.
